2026-06-30.patch_summary: This patch renames the CONFIG_ARCH_ENABLE_THP_MIGRATION configuration option to CONFIG_ARCH_SUPPORTS_PMD_SOFTLEAF, which more accurately reflects its purpose of enabling PMD-level softleaf machinery. The rename is a pure change and does not introduce any functional changes. It affects various architectures including x86, arm64, s390, riscv, loongarch, and powerpc on PPC_BOOK3S_64. The goal is to improve clarity in the configuration options.
